typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Runtime provider-only failover still iterates routes from legacy candidateRoutes() ordering in OpenBurnBarRunService.executeProviderOnlyRun(), while candidateRoutes()/selectRoutes do not consume scoreAndRankRoutes() output; routing winner is scorecard-driven, but failover alternates are not.

rejectedObservations.observation: Shared architecture note still describes ordered precedence route ranking while implementation uses weighted composite scoring.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous ownership/source-of-truth during an unresolved blocking routing review; not safe to apply a documentation update until runtime failover wiring is corrected.
